deviations.description: The process model allows for process termination both when the donor does not consent and when the donor retracts consent, as shown by the parallel gateway that always allows for retracting consent (see process model, page 1). Version 2 of the requirement only obligates termination when consent is not given, removing the obligation to terminate upon retraction of consent. The process continues to enforce the stricter, outdated constraint from Version 1, resulting in over-compliance.
process_model_reference: process termination upon retraction of consent
